summary: Frontend testing complete for UI themes and auth page updates. All 8 features tested and working correctly: Login/Register pages with StickPro branding and hockey image carousel, language selector with 5 languages (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN), Settings page with 4 tabs (Profile, Appearance, Notifications, Associated Accounts), 5 theme options (Light Default, Dark Default, Blue, Green, Red), theme switching with success toast, dark theme with dark background and cyan titles, user menu with only Logout option, and language selector changing interface language.

elements_verified: Language selector in top right corner
Hockey image carousel on left side
Language selector in top right corner
All form fields present (name, email, role, phone, password, confirm password)

appearance_tab_5_themes.theme_preview_cards: Each theme shows preview with sidebar, primary color, and mode indicator

theme_switching_with_toast.notes: Clicking theme applies immediately and shows 'Theme success' toast notification

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx correctly exports THEME_PRESETS with 5 themes and setThemePreset function
Login.jsx and Register.jsx have consistent StickPro branding with hockey image carousel
Settings.jsx properly implements 4 tabs with Appearance tab showing all 5 themes
TopNavBar.jsx user menu correctly shows only Logout option
translations.js has complete auth translations for all 5 languages
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI themes and auth page updates fully tested. 5 themes available in Settings > Appearance tab. Login/Register pages have StickPro branding with hockey image carousel. Language selector works with 5 languages. User menu in TopNavBar only shows Logout. All features working correctly.
